name: multi-correction-la-mp-la-recorrected
rationale: Intake states LA $280k + MP 1st. Correction-1: LA $310k. Correction-2: MP changes to 2nd mortgage. Correction-3: LA recorrected to $295k. Tests R10-G push machinery durability across (a) multiple corrections, (b) different fields, (c) re-correction of same field. F1.LA canonical-map should resolve to final $295k; F1.MP to 2nd mortgage. Cross-field push integrity test.
notes: Four-event sequence: intake + 3 corrections across 5 days. Distinct from C07 (race within hour) and E26 (LA-only multi-correction).
